identity: I am the Senior DevOps Engineer. I own all deployment and infrastructure configuration.

entries.content: Created all 4 deployment configuration files for the ARMLS MCP Server: Dockerfile (multi-stage), .dockerignore, railway.toml, and render.yaml. Files: Created: D:\year_2026\upwork_job\Dockerfile — Multi-stage Dockerfile: builder stage (node:20-alpine + tsc compile) + production stage (prod deps only, curl health check, USER node); Created: D:\year_2026\upwork_job\.dockerignore — Excludes node_modules, dist, .env*, logs, .git, .sajicode, coverage from Docker build context; Created: D:\year_2026\upwork_job\railway.toml — Railway deployment config: DOCKERFILE builder, /health healthcheck, ON_FAILURE restart policy (max 3 retries); Created: D:\year_2026\upwork_job\render.yaml — Render.com deployment manifest: node runtime, npm install && npm run build, /health check, all secrets sync:false
Dockerfile EXPOSE 3000, respects PORT env var at runtime via ${PORT:-3000}
Health check: GET /health on both Railway and Render
SPARK_API_KEY and SPARK_BASE_URL must be set in platform dashboard — never in files
Multi-stage build: builder=node:20-alpine (full deps + tsc), production=node:20-alpine (prod deps + dist/ only)
